title: calamintha sylvatica f. boveana
intro: Calamintha sylvatica f. boveana, also known as Mountain Calamint, is a subspecies of the Calamintha sylvatica plant, which is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it useful in treating digestive issues and soothing muscle aches. The health benefits of Calamintha sylvatica f. boveana include its ability to alleviate symptoms of indigestion, nausea, and headaches, as well as its potential to act as a natural antiseptic and anti-inflammatory agent. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it can also be used in cooking, adding a minty flavor to various dishes.
